summary: Live PR inventory shard classified independently. No shared canonical was selected, no security-sensitive items were detected, and no close, merge, fix, or label mutations are planned. Four PRs require maintainer judgment because they are focused ready/draft fixes or maintainer-owned drafts; one abandoned draft remains related Mattermost context and should stay open for now.

Maintainer-owned draft PR with focused runtime behavior changes should remain under maintainer control; no autonomous close or merge recommendation is appropriate.
Abandoned draft contains related Mattermost context but has unresolved correctness proof and no allowed replacement/fix path, so keep it open as related evidence.
Maintainer-owned draft PR with focused media runtime behavior changes needs maintainer judgment; no autonomous close or merge path is allowed.
